# clickhouse_roles (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all RBAC roles (both system and custom) in your ClickHouse Cloud organization.

## Example Usage

```hcl
data "clickhouse_roles" "all" {}

locals {
  admin_role_id = [for r in data.clickhouse_roles.all.roles : r.id if r.name == "Admin"][0]
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `roles` (Attributes List) List of all roles in the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--roles))

<a id="nestedatt--roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `roles`

Read-Only:

- `actors` (List of String) List of actors assigned to this role.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the role was created.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the role.
- `name` (String) Name of the role.
- `owner_id` (String) Owner ID of this role.
- `policies` (Attributes List) List of policies attached to this role. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--roles--policies))
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID that owns this role.
- `type` (String) Type of the role: 'system' or 'custom'.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the role was last updated.

<a id="nestedatt--roles--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `roles.policies`

Read-Only:

- `effect` (String) Whether this policy allows or denies the specified permissions.
- `id` (String) Server-assigned policy ID.
- `permissions` (Set of String) List of permission strings.
- `resources` (Set of String) List of resources this policy applies to.
- `role_id` (String) ID of the role this policy belongs to.
- `tags` (Attributes) Optional tags for additional policy metadata. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--roles--policies--tags))
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID that owns this policy.

<a id="nestedatt--roles--policies--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `roles.policies.tags`

Read-Only:

- `role` (String) SQL console role level for passwordless DB access. One of: sql-console-admin (full access), sql-console-readonly (read-only).
